'''larasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:off|off]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:off|off]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| larasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læræshæth|læræshæth]] || [[word:læræshæj|læræshæj]] || [[word:læræshæsh|læræshæsh]] || [[word:læræshæ|læræshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lararashath|lararashath]] || [[word:lararashaj|lararashaj]] || [[word:lararashash|lararashash]] || [[word:lararasha|lararasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:larashath|larashath]] || [[word:larashaj|larashaj]] || [[word:larashash|larashash]] || [[word:larasha|larasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:larafshafth|larafshafth]] || [[word:larafshafj|larafshafj]] || [[word:larafshafsh|larafshafsh]] || [[word:larafshaf|larafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larashatha|larashatha]] || [[word:larashaja|larashaja]] || [[word:larashasha|larashasha]] || [[word:larashaka|larashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larashath|larashath]] || [[word:larashaj|larashaj]] || [[word:larashash|larashash]] || [[word:larasha|larasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larashathal|larashathal]] || [[word:larashajal|larashajal]] || [[word:larashashal|larashashal]] || [[word:larashakal|larashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larashaathatha|larashaathatha]] || [[word:larashaajaja|larashaajaja]] || [[word:larashaashasha|larashaashasha]] || [[word:larashaaka|larashaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larashathan|larashathan]] || [[word:larashajan|larashajan]] || [[word:larashashan|larashashan]] || [[word:larashakan|larashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larashathaoro|larashathaoro]] || [[word:larashajaoro|larashajaoro]] || [[word:larashashaoro|larashashaoro]] || [[word:larashakaoro|larashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
